title: Feature Flags + Container Registry Security — Dynamic Flag Evaluation
description: flags/registry.py provides a typed feature flag registry with metadata, owner tracking, and expiry detection. test_container_registry_security_engine.py clusters here. Gap: feature flags are registered at startup but evaluation is not integrated with any runtime toggle — features in the codebase are not conditionally gated by flag checks, and container registry security scan policies are not flag-gated for gradual rollout.
missing: Runtime flag evaluation: implement get_flag(key, org_id) that returns the effective value considering org-level overrides stored in flags_overrides.db
Container registry policy flag gating: gate the block_unsigned_images policy behind a feature flag so it can be rolled out per-org without code changes
Flag expiry alerting: daily job that finds flags past their expiry date and sends Slack alert to flag.owner with a link to remove the flag
